name: Fighting Flame Sword
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>気</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>斬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Add 1 card from your Deck to your hand that mentions "Flame Swordsman", except "Fighting Flame Sword".
● When an attack is declared involving a FIRE Warrior monster you control: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
● When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets "Flame Swordsman", or a monster(s) that mentions it, that you control: Negate that effect.
You can only activate 1 "Fighting Flame Sword" per turn.
eff:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Add 1 card from your Deck to your hand that mentions "Flame Swordsman", except "Fighting Flame Sword".
● When an attack is declared involving a FIRE Warrior monster you control: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
● When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets "Flame Swordsman", or a monster(s) that mentions it, that you control: Negate that effect.
You can only activate 1 "Fighting Flame Sword" per turn.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
